meta.title: Argentina vs France — Final
meta.trigger_label: Second half — Argentina locked at 3-3, a moment of brilliance needed

context: A tense moment in this final match. Argentina and France are locked at 3-3. One tactical shift could be the difference between glory and heartbreak.

options.label: A
options.action: Make an attacking substitution to break the deadlock

options.label: B
options.action: Push the full-backs higher, create overloads out wide

options.label: C
options.action: Stay patient, maintain shape, look for a moment of magic

options.label: D
options.action: Go ultra-attacking — bring on an extra striker

real_decision.description: The match went to penalties after a 3-3 draw. Lionel Andrés Messi Cuccittini (22'), Ángel Fabián Di María Hernández (35'), Kylian Mbappé Lottin (79'), Kylian Mbappé Lottin (80'), Lionel Andrés Messi Cuccittini (107'), Kylian Mbappé Lottin (117').

pre_generated_explanations.A:
**OPTION A — Make an attacking substitution to break the deadlock**
Risk level: High. This is the positive choice. An attacking substitution signals intent and can break the deadlock. In the context of this final match between Argentina and France (3-3), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.B:
**OPTION B — Push the full-backs higher, create overloads out wide**
Risk level: Medium. This is the width-based approach. Overlapping full-backs create numerical advantages in wide areas. In the context of this final match between Argentina and France (3-3), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.C:
**OPTION C — Stay patient, maintain shape, look for a moment of magic**
Risk level: Medium. This is the patient choice. Maintaining shape avoids risk but may not be enough to win. In the context of this final match between Argentina and France (3-3), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.D:
**OPTION D — Go ultra-attacking — bring on an extra striker**
Risk level: Very High. This is the all-out attacking option. An extra striker increases goal threat but sacrifices midfield control. In the context of this final match between Argentina and France (3-3), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
